# Copilot Instructions (Repo-wide)

This repository contains a single project for portfolio demonstration.

## Scope safety
- This is a single-project repository (not multi-project)
- You may edit any project files to achieve portfolio-readiness
- history/ directory is for git historian outputs only (exclude from snapshots)

## Output requirements
- Portfolio readiness: fix absolute paths, remove assignment traces, update README, make runnable
- Git historian outputs go under history/:
  - github_steps.md
  - steps/step_01..step_N (full snapshots excluding history/ itself)

## Logging
- All proposed changes go to suggestion.txt (with locator + snippet)
- All applied changes go to suggestions_done.txt (before/after + locator)
- report.md must document all work performed

## No feature creep
- Do NOT add new product features
- Preserve original intent, outputs, and results
- Refactoring must be behavior-preserving
- Focus on professional presentation and reproducibility

## Do not stop early
Maintain a checklist and do not finish until all acceptance criteria are satisfied.
